violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the (storage shelves) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the (on top food boxes on food storage shelves ) area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
